summary_line: Portland OR fee-only fiduciary RIA specializing in technology employees at major Pacific Northwest + national tech employers (Intel, Microsoft, Nike, Amazon, Apple). $370.5M AUM, 5 advisors, 8 employees, 0 DRPs. Deep expertise in RSUs, stock options, deferred comp. Three stated principles: fiduciary, fee-only, independent — explicit rejection of Wall Street bank product shelf.

notable_events.event: ADV snapshot via IAPD CRD 152395 — 8 employees, 5 advisors, $370,502,204 regulatory AUM, 0 disciplinary disclosures. SEC file 801-71570. Legal name: 'CORDANT WEALTH PARTNERS.'

Site capture: extract.ts captured homepage only (sitemap=0, nav=0, known-paths=0); /services WebFetch succeeded but /about and /team returned 404 (URL pattern differs). HQ: 2175 NW Raleigh Street, Suite 110, Portland OR 97210. Homepage H1: 'FINANCIAL ADVICE FOR TECH EMPLOYEES.' Niche: technology employees at Intel, Microsoft, Nike, Amazon, Apple (named on services page). Specialties: RSUs, stock options, deferred comp, employer benefits optimization, tax minimization. Three stated principles: (1) Fiduciary — 'highest legal standard of care, choosing to act as an unwavering fiduciary in the best and exclusive interest of our clients,' (2) Fee-Only — 'do not sell any products, compensated solely for the advice we provide,' (3) Independence — 'free to structure our business in the way that best serves our clients, not constrained by the whims of a Wall Street bank.' Content surface: blog visible, ebook lead magnet ('GRAB OUR LATEST EBOOK'). 'AS SEEN IN' media list referenced. Tagline: 'DISCOVER HOW WE CAN HELP LOWER YOUR TAXES + MAKE WORK OPTIONAL' (the 'work optional' framing echoes Brindle & Bay's 'Amy & Dave — Work Optional' persona).
